SESSION VERDICT
THE PUBLIC WINS

Open models. Global builders. Public scrutiny.
Every rebuttal you landed is a real, sourced argument — tap RULES & RECEIPTS on the title screen for the record.

How to play

  • THE FILIBUSTER is endless. One hearing, all 13 real claims on rotation, and the waltz accelerates every phrase (104 BPM climbing toward 176 — the key rises each round too). There is no clearing it. There is only how long you hold the floor.
  • The five-bar ritual: HIS CLAIM types into the chyron (with its honesty stamp) → PREPARE (orbs leave the mic) → BUILD ×2 (your taps type the rebuttal and bank charge; misses get REDACTED) → RESOLUTION (the ★ RELEASE, the POINT, his comeback). One new thing per bar, every phrase, until it's muscle memory.
  • It's tennis. He serves his claims at you as orbs — TAP ANYWHERE the moment one reaches the ring and your swing sends it BACK up its own path. It lands ON him ~a quarter-second later: freeze-frame punch, POW, and your rebuttal word arriving with the ball. One tap, one hit — jabs climb a jab → cross → hook ladder so no two punches in a row look the same.
  • BUILD & RELEASE. Regular taps are quick jabs that bank charge into the gold CASE meter. The big gold ★ orb on each phrase's resolution downbeat is the RELEASE: hit it to spend the whole meter as one haymaker (damage scales with your build). Miss the ★ and the point is LOST — the case fizzles.
  • 🥊 HE FIGHTS BACK. The red LOBBY meter under his health charges as you play — faster when you miss, faster every round. Full meter = HIS phrase: the music muffles while he winds up (red rings pulse the count), then heavy 🔨 gavel orbs come at you — three, four from round 3. Tap each ON THE BEAT to PARRY. Parry them all → he's STAGGERED: wider windows and ×1.5 damage next phrase. Miss one → OBJECTION SUSTAINED: you take the hit, he heals, and he gains a structural advantage (absorb, block, or TIER GATE — PERFECTs count as GOOD while the ring is gated).
  • 🔻 KNOCKDOWNS are the score. Empty his health and he goes DOWN — stars, banner, one full phrase to savor it — then the lobby re-funds him: more health, a meaner meter, denser charts, and the waltz a key higher. He always comes back. That's the satire; outlast it anyway.
  • DOUBLE ORBS: two arrive together — tap with two fingers (or two keys). RED ✕ / 🐟 ORBS ARE BAIT — let them pass; punching bait feeds his meter fast.
  • Skipped orbs are soft misses — he mocks you, and his LOBBY meter feeds on it.
  • Desktop keys: D F J K (any of them — two at once for double orbs). Timing: PERFECT −30/+40ms · GOOD −50/+80ms (late-friendly). If everything suddenly misses, a bad mic-check offset is stored — tap the "mic check … TAP TO RESET" line on the Docket.
  • Motion status: loading clips…
  • 🎵 AMORE MODE: the song's final chorus, looping endlessly — each loop +8% faster and higher until it's unplayable. Load your own licensed copy ONCE — it's saved on this device (never uploaded anywhere) and auto-loads every visit after; or paste a hosted MP3 URL. The recording itself is never part of this page — the game ships only beat-timing data mapped to that exact track. His OBJECTION windup muffles the record and the strike snaps it back open; knockdowns roll straight into the next, faster loop.
  • 🎵 The whole hearing is in 3/4 — a crooner waltz that accelerates as the session runs long. He croons his claims on the call bars; the accompaniment dies to a lonely thump while the lobby holds an advantage; knockdowns get the full number. Preview it:

The receipts

THAT'S AMODEI! prototype · satire · A parody work: claims are real, cited public statements; rebuttals are sourced. Claim/reply lines are labeled: direct quote / near quote / satirical paraphrase / event card. Slapstick only — no injury; hits are arguments landing. The knockout jingle is an original waltz pastiche (not the copyrighted song), and the KO pun is a parody gag — toggleable via KO_PUN in source. Art: v1 research-pack mockups (placeholder); final art will be a generic composite.
